name: vdalhambra/siteaudit-mcp
description: Instant website audits MCP with 11 tools — full SEO (20+ checks), security headers + SSL, Lighthouse performance via Google PageSpeed, multi-site competitive comparison, broken link crawler, WCAG accessibility audit, Schema.org structured data validation, competitor gap analysis, robots.txt parser. No API keys. FastMCP 3.2, MIT.
